figures.caption: Fig. 2. Schematic wind farm layout with turbine positions normalized by D.

Fig. 3. Total farm power vs. simulated time for SFO, AMPC (RTI), and ESC. The AMPC trajectory is reported over a 1000 s window, which exceeds the characteristic wake-advection time scale of the layout.
Fig. 4. SFO control trajectories for all nine turbines.
Fig. 5. Ratio of cumulative computation time to simulated physical time (real-time feasibility metric).
